title: OpenAI 釋出 GPT 新版本 強化長上下文推理
description: OpenAI announces a major model update with improved long-context reasoning, agentic tool use, and lower latency for enterprise customers.

title: Anthropic 推出 Claude Agents 框架
description: Anthropic releases an agents framework allowing Claude to orchestrate browser, terminal, and code-execution tools with stronger safety guarantees.

title: Google 推 Gemini for Education 鎖定校園
description: Google launches Gemini for Education with classroom-safe tooling and free tier for K-12 institutions, expanding presence in Asia including Taiwan.

title: Hugging Face 上架新開源 70B 模型 對標 Llama
description: A new 70B parameter open-weights model lands on Hugging Face, with permissive license and benchmarks competitive with Llama 3 70B.

title: Show HN: An agent framework for orchestrating LLM tools
description: A new MIT-licensed framework for composing LLM-driven agents with deterministic tool routing and built-in evaluation harness.

title: GitHub Trending: example/cool-llm-tool
description: Lightweight LLM tool routing library, gained 4k stars in 24 hours.

title: On the Scaling Laws of Multimodal Foundation Models
description: We extend scaling-law analyses to vision-language and audio-language foundation models, finding consistent power-law trends across modalities.

title: 美國學區擴大 AI 一對一輔導試點
description: A growing number of school districts adopt AI tutors for after-school programs, with early evidence of math gains in middle school cohorts.

title: 國科會公布新一輪 AI 研究補助 重點為主權模型
description: Taiwan NSTC announces new AI grants targeting sovereign foundation models and Traditional Chinese benchmark datasets.

title: NVIDIA AI 部門季營收再創新高 帶動相關供應鏈
description: NVIDIA reports another record AI-segment quarter; analysts highlight tightening supply for Blackwell and downstream effects on TSMC orders.

title: OpenAI 釋出 GPT 新版本 — 強化長上下文推理 (轉載)
description: Aggregated copy of the OpenAI announcement with slightly different wording for dedup testing.

title: 歐盟提出新版 AI 監管細則 聚焦透明度與資料來源
description: The EU publishes detailed implementing rules under the AI Act, with stronger transparency and provenance disclosure obligations for foundation model providers.
